items.headline: Futures Indicate Continued Downside Amid Tech Sell-Off and Geopolitical Tensions
items.summary: U.S. equity futures are trading lower this morning, extending a risk-off sentiment that deepened on Friday. The tech sector continues to face significant selling pressure following a broad chip sell-off and concerns about competition from new AI models. Geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, coupled with rising crude oil prices, are further weighing on investor sentiment. Major benchmarks are poised to continue their slide, giving up early July momentum.

items.headline: S&P 500 Futures
items.statContext: S&P 500 futures fell toward monthly lows, testing the 7,500 handle.

items.headline: NASDAQ 100 Futures
items.statContext: Nasdaq 100 futures slid as the tech-led sell-off persisted.

items.headline: Dow Futures
items.statContext: Dow futures also dipped, reflecting broader market weakness.

items.headline: Netflix Inc. Sees Continued Pressure
items.summary: Streaming giant Netflix ($NFLX) experienced a significant pre-market decline on Friday, July 17th, following disappointing second-quarter revenue below Wall Street's estimates and weaker third-quarter guidance. This negative sentiment is expected to carry into today's trading.

items.headline: Intuitive Surgical Slumps on Outlook
items.summary: Intuitive Surgical ($ISRG) also fell sharply in pre-market trading on Friday, July 17th, after the medical technology company provided a weaker-than-expected outlook, with growth of its da Vinci robotic surgery system moderating in the U.S.

items.headline: Cadence Design Systems Down
items.summary: Cadence Design Systems ($CDNS) was among the pre-market losers on Friday, July 17th, likely affected by the broader sell-off in semiconductor and technology stocks.

items.headline: Trevi Therapeutics Noted in Early Trading
items.summary: Trevi Therapeutics ($TRVI) is appearing on lists of pre-market gainers today, though specific percentage changes are not yet available.

items.headline: Equinor ASA Shows Early Strength
items.summary: Equinor ASA ($EQNR), an energy company, is among the pre-market gainers. This aligns with broader strength in the energy sector due to rising oil prices.

items.headline: Global Chip Sell-Off Deepens Amid AI Concerns
items.summary: The sell-off in semiconductor stocks continues to be a dominant theme, with the Philadelphia SE Semiconductor Index logging its steepest weekly loss in over a year and entering a technical bear market. Concerns are intensifying that the massive gains fueled by the buildout of artificial intelligence have run too far, exacerbated by reports of a new competitive AI model from Chinese startup Moonshot AI.

items.headline: Oil Prices Surge on Heightened Middle East Tensions
items.summary: WTI Crude Oil futures have rallied to one-month highs, and Brent crude also saw significant gains, driven by escalating geopolitical tensions in the Middle East. Concerns about the flow of oil from the Arabian Gulf are intensifying after reports of ongoing conflict between the US and Iran.

items.headline: Key Economic Data Releases Expected Today
items.summary: Investors will be watching for several economic data releases today, July 18, 2026, including U.S. Initial Jobless Claims, Durable Goods Orders for June (preliminary), and the Conference Board Consumer Confidence for July, all due before market open or early in the trading session.

items.headline: Earnings Reports from HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank Today
items.summary: HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank are scheduled to release earnings reports today, July 18, 2026. Upcoming major reports next week include General Motors, Alphabet, and Tesla.
